title: The Undercover Economist
creator: Tim Harford
note: An accessible introduction to incentives, prices, markets and the economic choices hidden inside everyday life.

title: Asian Godfathers
creator: Joe Studwell
note: A critical account of family-controlled conglomerates, political influence and capital accumulation in Hong Kong and Southeast Asia.

title: Financial Times
creator: Financial Times
note: Useful for following UK fiscal policy, gilt markets, companies, trade and global macroeconomic developments.

title: The Economist
creator: The Economist
note: Provides concise arguments and comparative coverage of economic policy, business, politics and international relations.

title: Nikkei Asia
creator: Nikkei
note: A strong source for contemporary reporting on Asian companies, supply chains, technology, trade and regional policy.

title: The Wall Street Journal — Asia
creator: The Wall Street Journal
note: Useful for reporting and analysis on companies, investment, financial markets and economic developments across Asia.

title: UK Economic Accounts and Labour Market Data
creator: Office for National Statistics
note: Primary statistical material for checking claims about growth, inflation, employment, wages and household conditions.

title: Monetary Policy Report
creator: Bank of England
note: A primary source for understanding the Bank’s assessment of inflation, growth, interest rates and risks to the UK economy.
